case_title: DAVID MORGANSTERN VS. SFGH et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-22-2008 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JAN-22-2008 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: HELEN SOREP-MATLEY, CSR	225. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2007 Continued To Jan-22-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 1/22/2008 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Maureen Howard, CSR# 7156. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-22-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2007 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Carl Sauceda, CSR# 2031. (212)
